dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 07, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Power Surge: McCarthy Slams Rockies Past Mets, Guardians Outlast Royals 8-5"

Jake McCarthy's grand slam catapulted the Colorado Rockies to a 6-2 win over the New York Mets, while Michael Conforto's three-hit performance propelled the Chicago Cubs to an 8-3 victory over the Cincinnati Reds. On the mound, Shota Imanaga shut down the Reds with 10 strikeouts in six innings. Meanwhile, Alec Burleson's solo homer lifted the St. Louis Cardinals to a 2-1 win over the San Diego Padres, with Matthew Liberatore pitching six strong innings.
